name: Classic Cheeseburger
description: Juicy beef patty with melted cheddar, lettuce, tomato, and special sauce on a brioche bun.

name: Bacon BBQ Burger
description: Double beef patty topped with crispy bacon, smoky BBQ sauce, and onion rings.

name: Margherita Pizza
description: Wood-fired pizza with San Marzano tomato, fresh mozzarella, and basil.

name: Pepperoni Pizza
description: Classic hand-tossed pizza loaded with spicy pepperoni and melted mozzarella.

name: Chicken Pad Thai
description: Stir-fried rice noodles with chicken, peanuts, bean sprouts, and tangy tamarind sauce.

name: Beef Teriyaki Bowl
description: Grilled beef glazed in teriyaki sauce served over steamed rice with vegetables.

name: Sushi Combo Platter
description: Assortment of nigiri and maki rolls with salmon, tuna, and avocado.

name: Chocolate Lava Cake
description: Warm chocolate cake with a molten center, served with vanilla ice cream.

name: New York Cheesecake
description: Rich and creamy classic cheesecake with a graham cracker crust and berry compote.

name: Fresh Lemonade
description: House-made lemonade with real lemon juice and a hint of mint.

name: Iced Caramel Latte
description: Espresso with milk, caramel syrup, and ice for a smooth, sweet pick-me-up.

name: Craft Cola
description: Artisanal cola made with cane sugar and natural spices.
